taxonomy: × Orchidactyla timbaliana is classified within the infraorder Orchidorrhyncha, which is a subgroup of the infraorder Nemoptera and the order Mecoptera. This classification indicates that × Orchidactyla timbaliana is a type of scorpionfly. Specifically, it belongs to the family Bittacidae and the genus × Orchidactyla. The species name timbaliana further distinguishes it within its genus. This classification helps to organize and understand the relationships within the insect kingdom.
